summary: Tested AI-driven PosizionamentoPage and MasterclassPage after fix for local shim issue. All backend endpoints working (13/13 tests passed). AI generation endpoints now correctly use Emergent LLM proxy. Frontend pages rendering correctly with hero sections, 7 input fields, admin panoramic view, and generated output sections.
seed_data_creation: Test data created for Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto) - posizionamento inputs and masterclass answers
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI generation endpoints now working correctly after removing local shim at /app/backend/emergentintegrations/. The proper venv package (emergentintegrations==0.1.1) is now used. Both PosizionamentoPage and MasterclassPage render correctly with: hero sections, 7 input fields, admin panoramic view showing partner inputs, and generated AI output (6 positioning sections and 7 script sections).

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The local shim at /app/backend/emergentintegrations/ was bypassing the Emergent proxy and trying to call Anthropic API directly with an invalid key. This has been fixed by removing the local shim.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Local shim moved to emergentintegrations_OLD/. Now the proper venv package (emergentintegrations==0.1.1) is used which correctly routes LLM calls through the Emergent proxy.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 3 AI generation endpoints tested via curl and pytest - all returning valid JSON responses with expected structure.
